forgotSubtitle: Enter your email to generate a password recovery token.
forgotSuccess: If the account exists, recovery was started.
resetSubtitle: Enter the recovery token and your new password.
resetSuccess: Password reset complete. Sign in with your new password.
resetDebugTokenReady: A recovery token was generated in dev. It has already been filled in for you.
signupBenefit: Create a free account and get +2 credits per day.
loginSubtitle: Access your account to continue where you left off.
errorWeakPassword: Password must have at least 8 characters.
errorInvalidResetToken: Recovery token is invalid or expired.
accountPageSubtitle: Manage your account, security, current plan, daily usage and the foundation of the future billing area.
notAuthenticatedTitle: Sign in to manage your account
notAuthenticatedSubtitle: Once signed in, you will see your account data, plan usage, security and the future billing area in one place.
accountSectionSubtitle: Core information about your identity inside prevIA.
securitySectionSubtitle: Access login, recovery and password change actions.
planUsageSectionSubtitle: Summary of your current plan and daily credit consumption.
billingSectionSubtitle: Manage subscription, renewal, and financial sync without leaving prevIA.
billingPlaceholder: Not available in this version yet.
securityHintAuthenticated: In this first version, the main security action is password change. Later, this area can grow with linked login methods and sessions.
securityHintGuest: Sign in or create your account to access security, plan and billing in one centralized space.
profileSaveError: Could not save your data right now.
billingLoadError: Could not load the subscription right now.
billingNoPaidSubscription: No paid subscription was found for this account right now.
billingActionSuccessCancel: Renewal canceled successfully. Access remains active until the end of the period.
billingActionError: Could not update renewal right now.
billingCheckoutSubtitle: Review your plan and complete payment without leaving prevIA.
billingCheckoutSecureNote: Payment is processed inside the prevIA flow, with Stripe running in the background.
billingCheckoutCreateError: Could not prepare checkout right now.
billingCheckoutInlineError: Could not confirm payment right now.
billingCheckoutCurrencyLocked: Sandbox v1 is currently enabled in BRL to keep catalog and Stripe aligned.
billingPlanChangeAccountNote: Plan changes for active subscriptions will land in the next patch directly in My Account.
billingCheckoutFinalizingBody: We are confirming your payment and enabling your new plan in prevIA. This usually takes just a few seconds.
billingCheckoutFinalizingSlow: Your payment was received. The plan update is taking a bit longer than usual. You can refresh now.
changePasswordSubtitle: Confirm your current password and set a new password for this account.
errorAuthRequired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errorPasswordAuthNotAvailable: This account does not have a password set yet.
changePasswordSameAsCurrent: New password cannot be the same as the current password.
